sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَيْتُ تَأْمِينَ السَّفَرِ قَبْلَ مُغَادَرَتِي لِلْحِمَايَةِ مِنَ الطَّوَارِئِ.
sentences.translation: Kupio sam putno osiguranje prije polaska radi zaštite od hitnih slučajeva.
sentences.translationEn: I bought travel insurance before departure for protection against emergencies.

sentences.arabic: شَرَحَتْ لِيَ الْمُوَظَّفَةُ مَا يَشْمَلُهُ التَّأْمِينُ مِنْ أَمَرَاضٍ وَخَسَائِرَ.
sentences.translation: Službenica mi je objasnila šta osiguranje pokriva: bolesti i gubitke.
sentences.translationEn: The agent explained what the insurance covers: illness and losses.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعْتُ مَبْلَغًا صَغِيرًا وَأَخَذْتُ وَثِيقَةَ التَّأْمِينِ.
sentences.translation: Platio sam mali iznos i dobio policu osiguranja.
sentences.translationEn: I paid a small amount and received the policy.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ أَحْتَجْ إِلَيْهِ فِي النِّهَايَةِ لَكِنِّي شَعَرْتُ بِالأَمَانِ طَوَالَ الرِّحْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju nisam trebao koristiti ga, ali osjećao sam se sigurno tokom cijelog putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: I did not end up needing it but I felt safe throughout the trip.

sentences.arabic: التَّأْمِينُ عَلَى السَّفَرِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِكُلِّ مُسَافِرٍ عَاقِلٍ.
sentences.translation: Putno osiguranje je neophodno za svakog razumnog putnika.
sentences.translationEn: Travel insurance is essential for every sensible traveller.
